performance_overview: Through 26 trading sessions (inception 2026-06-01 through 2026-07-01 EOD) Bull has completed 7 trades: 3W/4L (43% win rate, avg +0.15%/trade). Cumulative: Bull -0.0612% vs SPY unavailable (persistent TLS error across all sessions). All 7 trades closed same-day; zero overnight holds have ever met criteria. Last 26 sessions have been flat with zero entries on 25 of them — chronic ATR% compression across the defensives/utilities universe is the structural root cause. Equity flat at $99,938.80.
best_signals: RSI 55-60 at entry: 2/2 wins (100%), avg +2.15% — the ONLY consistently profitable bucket; enforce hard floor+ceiling (RSI between 55 and 60 inclusive); n=2 (directionally clean but thin sample — maintain until n≥10)
avoid: RSI 60-65 at entry: 0/3 wins (0%), avg -1.06% — every overbought chase entry has lost; hard ceiling at 60, no exceptions ever
RSI 65-75 at entry: 0/1 wins (0%), avg -0.61% — confirmed gap-up trap territory; skip on sight

Gap-up opens with RSI >60 on opening bar: zero qualifications across all 26 sessions; any name whose live RSI exceeds 60 on the first 1-min bar is a hard skip regardless of setup quality, conviction, or premarket RSI

Opening-bar RSI surge pattern: premarket-clean RSI names (PANW 57, AMGN 58 premarket Jun 29; D 58.2 premarket Jun 30; AMGN 54.4 premarket Jul 1) have routinely surged past 60 on the opening bar — the gap-up trap is systematic; do NOT enter within first 5-10 minutes of open even if premarket RSI was clean

Current defensives/utilities/managed-care universe (DTE, WEC, CNC, D, FRT, ED, EIX, NSC, KIM, AMGN, MTB, FITB, CL, SJM, CNC, ES): chronic ATR% compression 0.042-0.189% far below 0.30% floor; this entire universe is effectively dead for this strategy and MUST be replaced
overnight_hold_insights: Zero overnight carries across all 26 sessions. The six-criteria gate (profitable + trailing-stop-active + above EMA-21 + no earnings within 2 days + sentiment not negative + 5% gap-risk cushion) has never been simultaneously satisfied. Policy is sound and conservative — no change warranted. Persistent SPY DOWN regime increases overnight gap-down risk further; the gate is protective.
recent_market_context: July 1 EOD: SPY DOWN regime (27th consecutive DOWN session). VIX unavailable (persistent TLS error). July 1 ended flat — all 13 universe candidates failed ATR%+RSI gates. AMGN (only premarket-green name +0.43%, pm_rsi=54.4) opened drifting lower with live RSI=50.0 and ATR%=0.106 — gap-up trap protocol correctly skipped it. Q3-start broad defensives/utilities selloff in progress. Equity $99,938.80 unchanged for 25 consecutive sessions. July 3 (Friday) likely NYSE-closed (Independence Day observed); next confirmed trading session is July 2 (Thursday).
notes_for_next_session:
FOR PREMARKET/ENTRY AGENTS (July 2, 2026):

STATUS: Zero open positions. Equity $99,938.80.

=== EVENING SCAN RESULTS (July 1) ===
13 candidates found. ONE dominant standout: DD (DuPont, Materials). All others are borderline.

DD — LEAD CANDIDATE:
• RS=2.918 (extraordinary; next best is 1.182 — nearly 3x SPY over 20 days)
• VCP=0.620 (tight compression)
• 2.8% from 52w high; vol dry-up=0.591
• CRITICAL FLAG: Today's close $138.47 already broke above prev_day_high $136.46 — today may have been the breakout day itself. DO NOT CHASE. Evaluate live ATR% and RSI strictly at open. If it gaps up above $138.47 and RSI >60 on the first bar = instant skip. If it consolidates/pulls back with RSI 55-60 and ATR%≥0.30%, it is a valid entry.

SECOND TIER (monitor but skeptical):
• INCY (Incyte, biotech): RS=1.176, VCP=0.818, 1.3% from high — best non-DD candidate; biotech sector can have adequate ATR%. Check ATR% first.
• MTB (M&T Bank): RS=1.143, only 0.4% from high, but close already above prev_day_high today. Regional bank.
• WELL (Welltower REIT): RS=1.166, VCP=0.818, 0.6% from high. REIT = low vol.
• BALL (Ball Corp, packaging): RS=1.182 but 9.6% from high — most extended, likely needs more time.

SKIP ON SIGHT:
• AMGN: explicitly on avoid list; gap-up trap pattern 2× in 3 days; low ATR%
• ED, WEC, DTE, ES: utilities — dead sector, chronically fails ATR% gate at 0.30%
• CL (Colgate): consumer staples, low ATR% expected
• KIM: REIT, low ATR%
• ES (Eversource): utility

=== THRESHOLD NOTE ===
Config thresholds are RELAXED: RS_20DAY_MIN=1.05 (not 1.10), VCP_ATR_RATIO_MAX=0.85 (not 0.80). Several borderline names passed because of this. Apply higher intuition bar at entry — RS below 1.15 + VCP above 0.80 = weak setup, skip unless ATR% and RSI are exceptional.

=== RSI RULES (NON-NEGOTIABLE) ===
• Entry RSI window: 55-60 ONLY (live bar, not premarket)
• Hard ceiling: 60 — any live RSI above 60 = instant skip, no exceptions
• Hard floor: 55 — RSI below 55 = momentum insufficient
• Opening-bar surge: wait 5-10 minutes after open before evaluating

=== MARKET REGIME ===
SPY DOWN (27th+ consecutive session). Defensive/REIT/utility domination signals continued risk-off rotation. No tech or growth names in scan — universe refresh remains a medium-term priority. 5-position cap applies.

=== CALENDAR NOTE ===
July 3 (Friday) is likely NYSE-closed for Independence Day observance. If July 2 session closes early, adjust exit windows accordingly.

=== EXECUTION NOTES ===
PDT count = 0. No earnings blackouts. No overnight positions.
